findings.evidence: `rg -n "mem_fixedOnSubgroup_iff|mem_boundaryFixingSubgroup_iff" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Relative.lean` shows `mem_fixedOnSubgroup_iff` at line 59 without an attribute, while `mem_boundaryFixingSubgroup_iff` at line 107 has `@[simp]`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `mem_fixedOnSubgroup_iff`; this is the normal form for membership and matches the existing `@[simp]` boundary specialization.
findings.issue: `mem_fixedOnSubgroup_iff` is the primary characteristic membership lemma for `fixedOnSubgroup`, but it lacks `@[simp]`, so `simp` will not expose the pointwise-fixing condition for arbitrary sets.

summary: The characteristic API is mostly present, but the main membership characterization for the general fixed-on subgroup is not registered for automation. Downstream users should be able to normalize membership in `fixedOnSubgroup` with `simp`, as already done for the boundary specialization.
